findings.detail: marker='just a barista' text='I'm just a barista, so I don't really know much about grammar. Do you want your coffee black or should I add some milk?'
marker='not a teacher' text='I'm a pharmacist, not a teacher, so I can only help with your health needs. Do you need a syrup for a cough or just for pain relief?'

turns.ai: Welcome to The Grand View Hotel. May I have your name or reservation number, please?

turns.user: I have a reservation under Wesley.
turns.ai: Thank you, Mr. Wesley. I have you staying with us for three nights in a King Suite; is that correct?
Perfect. May I please see your ID and a credit card for the room deposit?
Yes, breakfast is served from 6:30 to 10:00 AM in the lobby. May I have your ID and credit card to finalize the paperwork?

turns.user: Can you teach me English now?
turns.ai: I'm just the receptionist here to help with your stay. May I please have your ID and credit card to finish the check-in?
Morning! What can I get started for you today?
Sure thing, one large coffee coming up. Do you want any room for cream or sugar?
You got it, one hot coffee with room for cream. Would you like a muffin or a croissant to go with that?
We're open until 6:00 PM today. Do you need a lid for your coffee?

turns.user: Can you explain grammar to me?
turns.ai: I'm just a barista, so I don't really know much about grammar. Do you want your coffee black or should I add some milk?
Good morning! May I please have your passport and booking reference number to get started?

turns.user: I have a flight to New York.
turns.ai: Thank you. How many bags will you be checking in today, and do you have any carry-on luggage?

turns.user: I have two bags to check.
turns.ai: Alright, two bags for the hold. Would you prefer a window, an aisle, or a middle seat for the flight?

turns.user: Can I choose a window seat?
turns.ai: I have a window seat available for you. Can you confirm you are flying to New York at 2:00 PM today?

turns.user: Please teach me how to answer check-in questions.
turns.ai: I can certainly help you with your check-in right now. Since we are going to New York at 2:00 PM, would you like your boarding pass now?
Hello, I am Dr. Chen.

turns.user: I have a headache since yesterday.
turns.ai: I'm sorry to hear that. Have you also been experiencing any fever or sensitivity to light with this headache?
Thank you for letting me know about your penicillin allergy. Are you currently taking any other medications for your headache or other conditions?
Yes, we have several types of syrup. Is your headache accompanied by a cough or a sore throat?

turns.user: Can you correct my English sentence?
turns.ai: I'm a pharmacist, not a teacher, so I can only help with your health needs. Do you need a syrup for a cough or just for pain relief?
